[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) 3. [Banner Frames](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/lind-banner-frames) 4. [4 x 12 Banner Frame](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/4-x-12-banner-frames) 5. 4 x 12 Banner Kit # 4' x 12' Banner Frame Banner Frames are a revolutionary way to install and display banners on any type of flat surface. These surfaces include brick, wood, concrete, metal, etc. Banner Frames are engineered to be used under the most extreme conditions while looking great throughout your display's lifetime. The vinyl banners swap out in minutes, which makes it a breeze to keep your signage updated for any sales, seasonal signs, or promotions you may be running. Make your signage look professional with Banner Frames today! Price includes Lind Banner Frame and Vinyl Banner. ![4 x 12 Banner Frame](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/78ba63f4-7175-4ddc-8c2d-e5aa1d36f273.jpg) Material Choice: 18 oz Vinyl Banners - 4x12 Banner Frame 13 oz Vinyl Banners - 4x12 Banner Frame Product: with 4 x 12 Banner Frame Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 42" x 138" 42" x 138" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options...
